zh.lifeSummary: 當Owain ap Griffith Prince Of Upper Powys於1257年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾卡素時，他的父親Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn42歲，母親Hawise le Strange29歲。他於1290年與Joanna Corbet在英國武斯特斯爾貝斯福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1293年10月15日在他的家鄉享年36歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Owain ap Griffith Prince Of Upper Powys于1257年出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾卡素时，他的父亲Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn42岁，母亲Hawise le Strange29岁。他于1290年与Joanna Corbet在英国武斯特斯爾貝斯福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1293年10月15日在他的家乡享年36岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps derived in the Roman period from the Latin name Eugenius ( see Eugene ); alternatively, possibly from an Old Celtic name meaning ‘born of Esos’. Esos (or Aesos) was a Celtic god known to have been the subject of a cult in ancient Gaul.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gruffudd
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Owain ap Griffith Prince Of Upper Powys was born in 1257, in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn, was 42 and his mother, Hawise le Strange, was 29. He married Joanna Corbet in 1290, in Besford, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 15 October 1293, in his hometown, at the age of 36, and was buried in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England.

fr.Powys Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales: Castle, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Owain ap Griffith Prince Of Upper Powys est né en 1257, à Castle, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Hawise le Strange, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Corbet en 1290, à Besford, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1293, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Owain ap Griffith Prince Of Upper Powys 1257 in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn 42 und seine Mutter Hawise le Strange 29. Er hat 1290 in Besford, Worcestershire, England Joanna Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1293 im Alter von 36 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Owain ap Griffith Prince Of Upper Powys è nato il nel 1257 nel Castle, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Hawise le Strange, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Joanna Corbet nel 1290, nel Besford, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 ottobre 1293, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Owain ap Griffith Prince Of Upper Powysが1257年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアカストルで生まれた時，父Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwynは42歳，母Hawise le Strangeは29歳であった。1290年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベスフォードでJoanna Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1293年10月15日に故郷で36歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Owain ap Griffith Prince Of Upper Powys(이)가 1257년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise le Strange(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1290년 영국 워스스터실르 베스퍼드에서 Joanna Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1293년 10월 15일 그의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Owain ap Griffith Prince Of Upper Powys nasceu em 1257, em Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Hawise le Strange, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanna Corbet em 1290, em Besford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1293, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Owain ap Griffith Prince Of Upper Powys родился в 1257 г. в местности кастл, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise le Strange, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Corbet в 1290 г. в местности бесфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 октября 1293 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Owain ap Griffith Prince Of Upper Powys nació en 1257, en Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Hawise le Strange, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Joanna Corbet en 1290, en Besford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1293, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
